---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Use Case

Describe the problem you're trying to solve or the workflow you'd like to improve.

## Proposed Solution

Describe your ideal solution. How would it work from the user's perspective?

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you've thought about.

## Additional Context

Any other information, screenshots, or examples.
